overview: A premium, responsive wellness website for SanteThera — a door-to-door massage therapy service. Features an elegant pink/magenta/purple design with glassmorphism effects, smooth Framer Motion animations, 4 pages (Home, Services, About, Booking), and WhatsApp-integrated appointment booking.
features: Home page with hero, service highlights, testimonials, and CTA
Services page with 4 detailed therapy cards and pricing
About page with therapist story and split-section layout
Glassmorphism booking form with WhatsApp redirect
Floating WhatsApp button with pulse animation on all pages
Mobile-first responsive design with sticky navbar
